message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore + minor ssh.rs update

.gitignore additions:
- perf.data / perf.data.* (profiling artifacts)
- Charmed_*.png (screenshots)
- *.proptest-regressions (proptest regression tracking files)
- crates/demo_showcase/demo_*_*.txt (timestamped demo output files from
  logs, jobs, docs, wizard demo runs)
- crates/demo_showcase/demo_showcase_exports/ (export directory)
- *.snap.new (insta snapshot pending review files)

These patterns cover the ~40+ ephemeral files that accumulate from demo
runs, profiling sessions, and property test regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,3 +40,20 @@ charmed_rust_illustration.png
 
 # NTM agent coordination
 .ntm/
+
+# Profiling artifacts
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+
+# Screenshots
+Charmed_*.png
+
+# Proptest regression files
+*.proptest-regressions
+
+# Demo showcase ephemeral output
+crates/demo_showcase/demo_*_*.txt
+crates/demo_showcase/demo_showcase_exports/
+
+# Insta snapshot pending files
+*.snap.new
